data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Remote participant visibility on classroom screen', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions remote students being visible on a screen, but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this feature is operational. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of remote participant visibility on classroom screen.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
